g.text: Figure 0. Official evidence architecture under the v21 formal package

text.style: fill: #687782; font: 11px 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: This overview is designed to make the workload and layer-by-layer evidence structure visible without crossing the formal writing boundary.

text.style: fill: #687782; font: 10px 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: Data counts come from the currently adopted official entities only: 0912 text-construction files, 1048 formal DID panel/results, and the 1048 strict project-risk table.
